Changes to Outputs:
  + created          = "new-value"
  - deleted          = "old-value" -> null
  ~ updated          = "old-value" -> "new-value"
  ~ unknown_after    = "old-value" -> (known after apply)
  ~ sensitive_output = (sensitive value)
  ~ complex_output   = {
      ~ enabled = false -> true
      ~ ports   = [80] -> [80, 443]
    }
  ~ long_output      = "(long value omitted here for fixture readability)"
